content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
.
Students will be able to:
§ Explain the Cyber Crime and Origin of Cyber Crime; § Discribe the Classification of Cyber Crime;
§ Explain the technology in cyber crime;
§ Discuss the Cyber crime and cyber Law;
§ Discuss the Jurisprudence of Algeria Cyber Law and Crime;
Contenu de la matière
Chapter 1: Fundamentals of Cybercrime
Definition of Cybercrime
Contemporary Cybercrime
Terrestrial Crimes Versus Cybercrimes
Cybercrime and White Collar Crime
Chapter 2: Computer System as Target
1.Unauthorized Access Offences in Cyberworld
2.Emerging Threats: Expected Targets and Forms
3.Other Offences Associated with Hacking and Computer Viruses. 4. Unauthorized Modification of Computer Programs or Data.
Chapter 3: Challenges for Criminal Justice
1. Motives and types of the Cyber Criminal
2. Challenges for Criminal Justice and Law Enforcement 3. Transnational Legal Jurisdictions
4. Evidence Identification and Tracking
Chapter 4: Privacy, Security and SyberCrime Control
1.Anonymity, Privacy and Security Issues in Cyberworld 2. Strategies and Statutes for Prevention of Cybercrime 3.International laws and conventions on Cybercrime 4.Efforts combating Cybercrime in Algeria
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
• Computer Forensics and Cyber Crime: An Introduction, Marjie Britz
• Cyber crime strategy,!"#$%&'(!)!*+,
• Gordon, S.: Exploring spyware and adware risk assessment. Presentation to the Computers and Security Institute Conference, Phoenix, Arizona
